name_en: ❤️ B's Signature 'The Ashby' handbag, selected classic and timeless Canvas plaid pieces, paired with exquisite leather trim, and comes with a detachable coin pocket. Inspired by the traditional equestrian 🐎 Knight series, it presents a soft, minimalist silhouette, adorned with leather tassel trims and hand-painted painted edges. Dimensions 25 x 19 x 34cm
